arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold decision made as £50m man drops out: Liverpool predicted starting XI v Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool will hope to go nine points clear of second-placed Arsenal in the Premier League table when they head to Everton on Wednesday night. With...

arts.ttl: Analysis: Why Gakpo is thriving on the left wing under Slot
arts.sum: Gakpo now has 16 goals in all competitions this campaign, recovering from a slow start when he did not score in the league until Liverpool ’s 10th match in early November. Gakpo has a fabulous knack for arriving late at the far post to convert right-wing crosses, receiving three assists from Salah in Premier League matches.

arts.ttl: Plymouth stun Liverpool in FA Cup giant-killing
arts.sum: Watch highlights as the Championship's bottom side Plymouth Argyle knock out Premier League leaders Liverpool with a hard-fought victory in the FA Cup fourth round.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'were very close' to agreeing deal to sell Darwin Nunez in January - but three reasons caused the club to change their mind
arts.sum: Liverpool rejected two bids for Darwin Nunez in January, with Al-Nassr offering the Reds in excess of £62million for the Uruguayan to join, according to a report.

arts.ttl: 5 things spotted from Liverpool training as Arne Slot given Trent Alexander-Arnold dilemma
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Everton in the final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park on Wednesday and the Reds could potentially have a big boost to their squad with the return of Trent Alexander-Arnold

arts.ttl: Arne Slot Named His 'Greatest Liverpool Player of All Time'
arts.sum: When asked the question of who is the best-ever Liverpool player, Arne Slot gave an unsurprising answer.

arts.ttl: 'They can do it if': Duncan Ferguson shares how Everton can now beat Liverpool tomorrow night
arts.sum: Everton and Liverpool are set to lock horns in the rescheduled Merseyside derby at Goodison Park on Wednesday night. With the original fixture postponed because...

arts.ttl: Ex-Liverpool teammate claims Reds showing lack of 'respect' to Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Former Liverpool defender Dejan Lovren has claimed the club is not showing enough "respect" to Mohamed Salah, who is on course to leave Anfield as a free agent in the summer. Salah's current Liverpool contract is due to expire at the end of June and he is yet to agree a new deal.

arts.ttl: Analysis: How Moyes has transformed Everton's fortunes
arts.sum: It’s fitting that Moyes – the only surviving manager to take charge of at least 500 games for Everton – will lead them into battle in what will be the final Merseyside derby to be played at Goodison Park. David Moyes's Everton go into the last Merseyside derby ever at Goodison Park in strong form, with three straight Premier League wins.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes and Jamie Carragher agree on Liverpool FA Cup exit but Man Utd icon fires warning
arts.sum: Liverpool were ousted from the FA Cup by Championship side Plymouth at the weekend but Paul Scholes and Jamie Carragher believe it could actually help them in their pursuit of success
